mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_NO as seqNo, PROP_CD as propCd, TITLE as title, REPORT as report, RACTION as raction, FEEDBACK as feedback, FEEDBACK_YN as feedbackYn, DATE_FORMAT(R_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rDt FROM KOK_CALL_MNTR WHERE REPORT IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(REPORT) != '' AND FEEDBACK IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(FEEDBACK) != '' AND FEEDBACK_YN = 'Y' AND '2025-01-01' > R_DT ORDER BY R_DT DESC -- LIMIT 5000 -- LIMIT 100

SELECT SEQ_NO as seqNo, PROP_CD as propCd, TITLE as title, REPORT as report, RACTION as raction, FEEDBACK as feedback, FEEDBACK_YN as feedbackYn, DATE_FORMAT(R_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rDt FROM KOK_CALL_MNTR WHERE REPORT IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(REPORT) != '' AND FEEDBACK IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(FEEDBACK) != '' AND FEEDBACK_YN = 'Y' AND R_DT > #{lastSyncDt} ORDER BY R_DT ASC
